arabic: إنما الأعمال بالنيات وإنما لكل امرئ ما نوى
english: Actions are judged by intentions, and everyone will get what they intended
subtitle: On Intentions

arabic: الدين النصيحة
english: Religion is sincere advice to Allah, His Messenger, and Muslims
subtitle: On Religion

arabic: من سنّ سنة حسنة فعمل بها بعده كان له أجره وأجر من عمل بها
english: Whoever establishes a good practice, and people act upon it, will have their reward and the reward of those who act upon it
subtitle: On Good Practices

arabic: الراحمون يرحمهم الرحمن ارحم من في الأرض يرحمك من في السماء
english: The merciful will be shown mercy by the Most Merciful. Be merciful to those on earth
subtitle: On Mercy

arabic: لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يحب لأخيه ما يحب لنفسه
english: None of you believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself
subtitle: On Brotherhood

arabic: من لا يشكر الناس لا يشكر الله
english: Whoever does not thank people has not thanked Allah
subtitle: On Gratitude

arabic: الكلمة الطيبة صدقة
english: A kind word is an act of charity
subtitle: On Kind Speech

arabic: خيركم خيركم لأهله وأنا خيركم لأهلي
english: The best among you are those who are best to their families, and I am the best to my family
subtitle: On Family

arabic: اتق الله حيثما كنت وأتبع السيئة الحسنة تمحها
english: Fear Allah wherever you are, and follow a bad deed with a good one to erase it
subtitle: On Piety

arabic: من غدا إلى المسجد أو راح أعدّ الله له ضيافة في الجنة
english: Whoever goes to the mosque in the morning or evening, Allah prepares for him a place in Paradise
subtitle: On Mosques

arabic: رحم الله امرأ قام من الليل فصلى وأيقظ امرأته فإن أبت نضح في وجهها الماء
english: May Allah have mercy on a man who wakes up at night to pray and awakens his wife
subtitle: On Night Prayer

arabic: الحج عرفة
english: Hajj is Arafat (standing at Mount Arafat)
subtitle: On Hajj

arabic: إن الله يحب إذا عمل أحدكم عملا أن يتقنه
english: Allah loves that when any of you does something, he does it with excellence
subtitle: On Excellence

arabic: المسلم أخو المسلم لا يظلمه ولا يخذله ولا يحقره
english: A Muslim is the brother of another Muslim: he does not oppress him nor does he abandon him
subtitle: On Brotherhood

arabic: بينما نحن عند النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم إذ جاء رجل يسعى
english: While we were sitting with the Prophet, a man came running
subtitle: On Respect

arabic: من قطع رحمه دخل النار ولا تدخل الجنة نفس قاطعة الرحم
english: Whoever severs the ties of kinship will not enter Paradise
subtitle: On Kinship

arabic: أفضل الزكاة ما كانت عند غنى وابدأ بمن تعول
english: The best charity is when given despite need, and begin with those you support
subtitle: On Charity

arabic: سلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته هذه تحية الله إياكم
english: Peace be upon you and the mercy and blessings of Allah - this is Allah's greeting
subtitle: On Greetings

arabic: من آمن بالله واليوم الآخر فليكرم ضيفه
english: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should honor his guest
subtitle: On Hospitality

arabic: الصائم في الحج والعمرة كالشاة في الحرم
english: A fasting pilgrim is like a slaughtered animal in the Haram
subtitle: On Fasting During Hajj

arabic: لا يستقيم إيمان عبد حتى يستقيم قلبه ولا يستقيم قلبه حتى يستقيم لسانه
english: A person's faith is not complete until their heart is sound, and their heart cannot be sound until their tongue is sound
subtitle: On The Heart and Tongue

arabic: من ستر مسلما ستره الله يوم القيامة
english: Whoever conceals the fault of a Muslim, Allah will conceal his faults on the Day of Judgment
subtitle: On Concealing Faults

arabic: إذا مرضت فهو يشفين وإذا أنا جعت فهو يطعمين
english: When I am ill, He cures me, and when I am hungry, He feeds me
subtitle: On Allah's Care

arabic: من يرد الله به خيرا يصب منه
english: Whoever Allah wants good for, He tests them
subtitle: On Tests

arabic: ما من مسلم يموت فيقوم على جنازته صف من المسلمين ما يقل عددهم ثلاثة فيصلون عليه
english: No Muslim dies such that the Muslim standover his funeral prayer being at least three rows
subtitle: On Funeral Prayers

arabic: الحياء شعبة من الإيمان والخيلاء شعبة من النفاق
english: Modesty is a part of faith, and vain glory is a part of hypocrisy
subtitle: On Modesty

arabic: من بدّل دينه فاقتلوه
english: Whoever changes his faith, execute him
subtitle: On Apostasy

arabic: الإيمان بضع وسبعون شعبة أعلاها لا إله إلا الله وأدناها إماطة الأذى عن الطريق
english: Faith has more than seventy branches, the highest is 'La ilaha illallah' and the lowest is removing harm from the path
subtitle: On Faith

arabic: الجار قبل الدار والرفيق قبل الطريق
english: Know your neighbor before you buy a house, and know your companion before you start the journey
subtitle: On Relationships

arabic: أد الأمانة إلى من ائتمنك ولا تخن من خانك
english: Return the trust to one who entrusted you, and do not betray one who betrayed you
subtitle: On Trusts

arabic: اجتنب السجود على سبعة
english: Avoid prostration on seven parts
subtitle: On Prayer

arabic: من قال حين يصبح وحين يمسي اللهم إني أسلمت نفسي إليك
english: Whoever says in the morning and evening: O Allah, I submit myself to You
subtitle: On Remembrance

arabic: إن الله لا ينظر إلى أجسادكم ولا إلى صوركم ولكن ينظر إلى قلوبكم
english: Allah does not look at your bodies or forms, but looks at your hearts
subtitle: On Hearts

arabic: الحسب واللون والجمال لا يورثان والعقل والعلم والأدب يورثان
english: Lineage, color, and beauty are not inherited, but intellect, knowledge, and manners are
subtitle: On Inheritance

arabic: من تعلم لغة قوم أمن مكرهم
english: Whoever learns the language of a people is safe from their deception
subtitle: On Languages

arabic: قل لا أملك لنفسي نفعا ولا ضرا إلا ما شاء الله
english: Say: I have not control over any benefit or harm for myself except as Allah wills
subtitle: On Divine Will

arabic: لا تغضبوا فإن الغضب من الشيطان
english: Do not become angry, for anger is from the devil
subtitle: On Anger

arabic: آمن الجار بالجار والدار بالدار والرفيق بالرفيق
english: Believe in neighbors by neighbors, and homes by homes, and companions by companions
subtitle: On Community

arabic: من عزل نفسه عن قومه أشفق الناس عليه
english: Whoever isolates himself from his people, people become sympathetic to him
subtitle: On Isolation

arabic: من بات طاهرا بات ملك في فراشه
english: Whoever goes to sleep in a state of purity, an angel stays in his bed
subtitle: On Purity

arabic: لا تحقرن من المعروف شيئا ولو أن تلقى أخاك بوجه طليق
english: Do not despise any good deed, even if it is to greet your brother with a smiling face
subtitle: On Good Deeds

arabic: العقل غريزة تزيد بالعلم والتجارب
english: Intellect is an instinct that increases with knowledge and experience
subtitle: On Intelligence

arabic: من تتبع عورات الناس تتبع الله عورته
english: Whoever seeks the faults of people, Allah will seek his faults
subtitle: On Privacy

arabic: احذر من الفاسد والفسد والفاسق والفسيق
english: Beware of the corrupt, corruption, the corrupt person and the corrupt action
subtitle: On Corruption

arabic: من قال لا إله إلا الله دخل الجنة
english: Whoever says 'There is no god but Allah' enters Paradise
subtitle: On Tawheed

arabic: السفر قطعة من العذاب
english: Traveling is a piece of punishment
subtitle: On Travel

arabic: ما أحد أعظم جرما عند الله من رجل تولى أمر أمة فلم يحطط عليهم
english: No one commits a greater sin before Allah than a person appointed over people who neglects them
subtitle: On Leadership

arabic: من جلس في مجلس يلغو فيه سمع ناشرة من النار
english: Whoever sits in a gathering where vain talk occurs hears a blast from Hell
subtitle: On Gatherings

arabic: كل الناس يصبح فيبيع نفسه فمنهم من يعتقها ومنهم من يوبقها
english: Every person sets out to sell himself in the morning, some free themselves and some enslave themselves
subtitle: On Actions

arabic: من حسن إسلام المرء تركه ما لا يعنيه
english: From the signs of a good Muslim is that he abandons what does not concern him
subtitle: On Focus

arabic: الحيل والحرام في جهنم
english: Tricks and tricks to evade Islamic law lead to Hell
subtitle: On Honesty

arabic: احفظ الله يحفظك احفظ الله تجده تجاهك
english: Keep Allah's commands, He will keep you. Remember Allah, He will remember you
subtitle: On Protection

arabic: من رأى منكم منكرا فليغيره بيده فإن لم يستطع فبلسانه فإن لم يستطع ففي قلبه
english: Whoever sees an evil must change it with his hand, or if unable then with his tongue, or if unable then with his heart
subtitle: On Changing Evil

arabic: لولا ستر الله علينا لفضحنا ولولا رحمة الله إلى أين يذهب بنا
english: If Allah did not conceal our faults, He would expose us; if not for His mercy, where would we go
subtitle: On Allah's Mercy

arabic: ما من أحد ينام إلا وملك يحرسه
english: There is no one who sleeps except that an angel guards him
subtitle: On Angels

arabic: إذا قام أحدكم يصلي فلا يبصق قبل وجهه ولا عن يمينه
english: When any of you stands to pray, do not spit in front of you or to your right
subtitle: On Prayer

arabic: الطيرة شرك
english: Ill omens are a form of shirk (polytheism)
subtitle: On Superstition

arabic: والله لا يؤمن والله لا يؤمن والله لا يؤمن، قيل يا رسول الله من؟ قال من لا يأمن جاره بوائقه
english: By Allah, he does not believe, by Allah he does not believe - it was asked who O Messenger - the one whom his neighbor is not safe from his harm
subtitle: On Neighbors

arabic: إن الله لا ينسى أحدا لكن الناس ينسون
english: Allah does not forget anyone, but people forget
subtitle: On Memory

arabic: من حج فلم يرفث ولم يفسق خرج من ذنوبه كيوم ولدته أمه
english: Whoever performs Hajj without obscenity or disobedience, returns from sins as the day his mother bore him
subtitle: On Hajj
